query:

UNION ALL
SELECT 'event_order_items', COUNT(*) FROM event_order_items
UNION ALL
SELECT 'workshop_bookings', COUNT(*) FROM workshop_bookings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'workshops', COUNT(*) FROM workshops
UNION ALL
SELECT 'event_inquiries', COUNT(*) FROM event_inquiries;
